voice_observations.caption_text:
Introducing the latest arrivals in our Innovation Hub - the 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟐𝟐 𝐒𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐒 𝐂𝐨𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐁𝐢𝐤𝐞 and 𝐑𝐄𝐅𝐋𝐄𝐗™️ 𝐓𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐥 powered by 𝐢𝐅𝐢𝐭.

Explore the Pyramids of Egypt 🚴
Hike the Scottish Highlands 🏃
Stroll through Florence 🚶

We’re constantly looking ahead, embracing the latest innovations to deliver smarter, more engaging training experiences for our members.

Available now at Fitness First Oasis Mall.

𝐄𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐨𝐮𝐭. 𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝. 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐫.
#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️

#FitnessFirstMe #AboveAndBeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #InnovationHub #NextGenCardio #TrainAnywhere #Freemotion #ReflexTreadmill #iFitPowered #CardioRevolution
voice_observations.hook_text: Introducing the latest arrivals in our Innovation Hub
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hey guys this is new innovation hub introducing for our members we'll completely change the way they train we'll be featuring game-changing equipment that will give more interaction to our members and engaging workout experience by combining technology design and expert programming we're elevating every workout one session at a time we're super excited to be here at fitness first innovation hub we're presenting three motion and we're the first feature at the hub we're introducing our cardio best-in-class products the reflex deck and our coach bike we have over 17 18 000 instructor-led workouts with auto-adjusting cardio machines most important feature on this machine is safety the reflex cushioning has shown to average a 29 percent greater reduction in impact force compared to running on other traditional treadmills as well as having all of the features of ifit where you can create your own workout using google maps where you can plot the run you used to do in your hometown we're super excited to see you all using our free motion fitness equipment here at the fitness first innovation hub
